title: thalictrum elatum lusus ledebourii
intro: Thalictrum elatum lusus ledebourii, also known as the tall meadow rue, is a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a variant of the tall meadow rue (Thalictrum elatum), characterized by its unique leaf shape and growth habit. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. In herbal medicine, Thalictrum elatum lusus ledebourii is used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, and is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion.
